name: Leftover Rice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, brown sugar, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl, beat the eggs with the skim milk until well mixed.
3. Add the vegetable oil and almond extract to the egg mixture.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring in the cooked rice last.
5. Pour the batter into 12 muffin cups.
6. Bake at 440°F (225°C) for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
